summary: Settings page refactoring and Guardian page regression testing complete. All 27 tests passed. The subscription management components (SubscriptionManagement.js, PlanCard.js, BillingToggle.js) are properly extracted and integrated into SettingsPage.js. Guardian page continues to work correctly.

issues: React key warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key /admin' - cosmetic issue from sidebar navigation, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Settings page container (data-testid='settings-page') loads correctly
Profile section displays user info (Test Admin, admin@carryon.com, Admin badge)
Push Notifications section renders with blocked notification message
Subscription Plan section renders with CreditCard icon
Beta Mode status bar shows 'Beta Mode — All features free'
Billing toggle (data-testid='billing-toggle') renders with 3 options
Monthly billing button (data-testid='billing-monthly') clickable
Quarterly billing button (data-testid='billing-quarterly') with -10% badge clickable
Annual billing button (data-testid='billing-annual') with -20% badge clickable
Plan grid (data-testid='plan-grid') renders with plan cards
Premium plan card (data-testid='plan-premium') with 'Most Popular' badge
Standard plan card (data-testid='plan-standard') with blue styling
Base plan card (data-testid='plan-base') with green styling
Appearance section with Dark mode toggle (data-testid='settings-theme-toggle')
Notifications section with Weekly Estate Digest toggle
Security section with Change Password and Two-Factor Authentication buttons
Sign Out button (data-testid='settings-logout-button') visible and styled
Guardian page container (data-testid='estate-guardian') loads
Guardian header with 'Estate Guardian' title and 'AI estate specialist' subtitle
Welcome actions container (data-testid='welcome-actions') with 3 action buttons
Analyze Vault button (data-testid='guardian-action-analyze_vault') clickable
Generate Checklist button (data-testid='guardian-action-generate_checklist') visible
Readiness Score button (data-testid='guardian-action-analyze_readiness') visible
Chat input field (data-testid='guardian-input') functional
Send button (data-testid='guardian-send-button') visible
Suggested questions visible below welcome message
Legal disclaimer 'Not legal advice. Consult a licensed attorney.' visible
critical_code_review_comments: SubscriptionManagement.js properly uses PlanCard and BillingToggle components
All data-testid attributes preserved correctly after refactoring
Plan cards display correct tier colors (gold/Premium, blue/Standard, green/Base)
Billing toggle interaction working - prices update on toggle
Guardian page maintains 100% functionality after Settings refactoring
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings page refactoring verified. Subscription components properly extracted to /app/frontend/src/components/settings/ (SubscriptionManagement.js, PlanCard.js, BillingToggle.js). All plan cards, billing toggles, and status bars render correctly. Guardian page working 100%. App URL: https://guardian-hierarchy.preview.emergentagent.com. Login: admin@carryon.com / admin123.
